title: gRPC Service Definitions
description: Implement gRPC service definitions for various communication patterns (Unary, Streaming). Architect client-streaming, server-streaming, and bidirectional-streaming gRPC contracts. Evaluate gRPC as an inter-service communication framework compared to REST.
objectives: Implement gRPC service definitions for various communication patterns (Unary, Streaming).
Architect client-streaming, server-streaming, and bidirectional-streaming gRPC contracts.
Evaluate gRPC as an inter-service communication framework compared to REST.
